var_def: Source grid-cell identifier (1-degree parent; not unique alone). Part of the compound cell entity key.
label: Cell id (1-deg parent)

var_def: Source subcell identifier. Part of the compound cell entity key.
label: Subcell id

var_def: Source 0.25-degree subcell identifier. Part of the compound cell entity key.
label: 0.25-deg subcell id

var_def: ISO3 country code (GADM GID_0); HKG/MAC/XKX restored to the cell-data codes. For region panels it is the parent country and part of the compound entity key.
label: Country (ISO3)

var_def: Calendar year of the estimate (2012-2022).
label: Year

var_def: Cell centroid longitude (degrees, EPSG:4326).
label: Longitude

var_def: Cell centroid latitude (degrees, EPSG:4326).
label: Latitude

var_def: Predicted cell GDP total (Gross Cell Product), const 2021 PPP.
label: Cell GDP (const 2021 PPP, model scale)

var_def: Population of the cell (persons).
label: Cell population

var_def: Cell GDP per capita, const 2021 PPP (= GCP / pop_cell).
label: Cell GDP per capita (const 2021 PPP, model scale)

var_def: 1 if the cell GDP was zeroed by the low-pop-density adjustment, else 0.
label: Cell censored flag

var_def: Per-year national GDP raking factor = PWT rgdpo / sum(model GCP).
label: GDP raking factor

var_def: Per-year national population raking factor = PWT pop / sum(pop_cell).
label: Population raking factor

var_def: GDP rescaled to PWT; national sum per year equals PWT rgdpo exactly.
label: GDP rescaled to PWT (mil. 2021 US$ PPP)

var_def: Population rescaled to PWT; national sum per year equals PWT pop exactly.
label: Population rescaled to PWT (millions)

var_def: gdp_pwt / pop_pwt, 2021 US$/person; 0 for censored cells, missing if zero population.
label: GDP per capita (2021 US$ PPP)

var_def: Natural log of gdppc; missing where gdppc <= 0 (censored / zero-pop).
label: Log GDP per capita

var_def: GCP 5th pct rescaled to PWT. Cell-level; do NOT sum across cells.
label: Cell GDP 5th pct rescaled (mil. 2021 US$)

var_def: GCP 95th pct rescaled to PWT. Cell-level; do NOT sum across cells.
label: Cell GDP 95th pct rescaled (mil. 2021 US$)

var_def: Across-tree SD of GCP rescaled to PWT. Cell-level; not additive.
label: Cell GDP across-tree SD rescaled (mil. 2021 US$)

var_def: National population from the source dataset.
label: National population

var_def: Country name (GADM COUNTRY / NAME_0).
label: Country

var_def: GADM admin1 code (GID_1) of the region containing the cell.
label: Admin1 code

var_def: GADM admin1 name (NAME_1).
label: Admin1 name

var_def: GADM admin1 type (ENGTYPE_1; e.g. Department).
label: Admin1 type

var_def: How the cell was assigned to its admin1: 'within' (centroid in polygon) or 'nearest' (snapped fallback).
label: Admin1 assignment

var_def: GADM admin2 code (GID_2) of the region containing the cell.
label: Admin2 code

var_def: GADM admin2 name (NAME_2).
label: Admin2 name

var_def: GADM admin2 type (ENGTYPE_2; e.g. Province).
label: Admin2 type

var_def: How the cell was assigned to its admin2: 'within' or 'nearest' (snapped fallback).
label: Admin2 assignment
